name: Kotlin LSP
description: Installs the JetBrains Kotlin Language Server (kotlin-lsp) and registers it as a CLI command on the PATH.

version.description: Version of kotlin-lsp to install (e.g. '262.2310.0'), or 'latest' to fetch the most recent release.

installJava.description: Install OpenJDK 17 (headless JRE) when no Java >= 17 is detected on PATH.
